metadata.title: Commander
metadata.description: Customize your workspace by adding commands everywhere, create Macros and supercharge your mobile toolbar.

regex.source: .setDesc("Set how many Rows the Mobile Toolbar should have. Set this to 0 to remove the Toolbar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置移动工具栏应有多少行。将其设置为0以移除工具栏。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use a column based layout instead of the default row. This makes it easier to arrange the Commands.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用基于列的布局代替默认的行布局。这使得安排命令更加容易。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Offset the Toolbar from the Bottom of the Screen. This is useful if the toolbar is partially obscured by other UI Elements.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从屏幕底部偏移工具栏。如果工具栏部分被其他UI元素遮挡，这将很有用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Change the Height of each Button inside the Mobile Toolbar (in px).")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改移动工具栏内每个按钮的高度（以px为单位）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Change the Width of each Button inside the Mobile Toolbar (in px).")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改移动工具栏内每个按钮的宽度（以px为单位）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Some Themes need extra spacing in the toolbar. If your Toolbar doesn't wrap properly, try increasing this value.")
regex.target: .setDesc("某些主题需要工具栏中有额外的间距。如果您的工具栏无法正确换行，请尝试增加此值。")
.setTooltip("重置为默认值 - 需要重启")

regex.source: "As of Obsidian 0.16.0 you need to explicitly enable the View Header."
regex.target: "从Obsidian 0.16.0开始，您需要显式启用视图标题。"

regex.source: "As of Obsidian 1.1.0 you can reorder the Buttons in the left ribbon by dragging. This will replace the old sorting feature."
regex.target: "从Obsidian 1.1.0开始，您可以通过拖动对左侧功能区中的按钮进行重新排序。这将取代旧的排序功能。"

regex.source: "As of Obsidian 0.16.0 you need to explicitly enable the Tab Title Bar. Once enabled, you might need to restart Obsidian."
regex.target: "从Obsidian 0.16.0开始，您需要显式启用选项卡标题栏。启用后，您可能需要重新启动Obsidian。"

regex.source: "When clicking on a Command in the Explorer, the Explorer view will become focused. This might interfere with Commands that are supposed to be executed on an active File/Explorer."
regex.target: "单击资源管理器中的命令时，资源管理器视图将成为焦点。这可能会干扰本应在活动文件/资源管理器上执行的命令。"

regex.source: "The Toolbar is only available in Obsidian Mobile. "
regex.target: "工具栏仅在 Obsidian 移动端中可用。"

regex.source: setDesc("Set how many Rows the Mobile Toolbar should have. Set this to 0 to remove the Toolbar."
regex.target: setDesc("设置移动工具栏应具有的行数。将此值设置为0可删除工具栏。"

regex.source: setDesc("Use a column based layout instead of the default row. This makes it easier to arrange the Commands."
regex.target: setDesc("使用基于列的布局，而不是默认的行。这样可以更容易地排列命令。"

regex.source: setDesc("Offset the Toolbar from the Bottom of the Screen. This is useful if the toolbar is partially obscured by other UI Elements."
regex.target: setDesc("将工具栏从屏幕底部偏移。如果工具栏被其他 UI 元素部分遮挡，这将非常有用。"

regex.source: setDesc("Change the Height of each Button inside the Mobile Toolbar (in px)."
regex.target: setDesc("更改移动端工具栏中每个按钮的高度(以 px 为单位)。"

regex.source: setDesc("Change the Width of each Button inside the Mobile Toolbar (in px)."
regex.target: setDesc("更改移动工具栏中每个按钮的高度(以 px 为单位)。"

regex.source: setDesc("Some Themes need extra spacing in the toolbar. If your Toolbar doesn't wrap properly, try increasing this value."
regex.target: setDesc("某些主题在工具栏中需要额外的间距。如果工具栏无法正确换行，请尝试增加此值。"

regex.source: "To configure which Commands show up in the Toolbar, open the Mobile Settings."
regex.target: "To configure which Commands show up in the Toolbar, open the Mobile Settings."

regex.source: Show the "Add Command" Button in every Menu. Requires restart.'
regex.target: 在每个菜单中显示"添加命令"按钮。需要重新启动。'

regex.source: description:'Show the "Add Command" Button in every Menu.'
regex.target: description:'在每个菜单中显示 "添加命令" 按钮。'
